market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Modern Canal‑Side 2‑BR Apartment, Steps to Water
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your canalside retreat – a bright, entire‑home 2‑bedroom apartment perfectly suited for up to four guests. Nestled beside the water, the flat features a private balcony where you can enjoy sunrise coffee or evening drinks with the gentle sound of passing boats. Inside, the open‑plan living area offers a comfortable sofa, a flat‑screen TV, and a fully equipped kitchen stocked with all the essentials for home‑cooked meals. Both bedrooms are thoughtfully arranged: the master hosts a queen‑size bed, while the second bedroom provides a double bed, ensuring restful nights for every traveler. 

The apartment has earned a stellar 4.82 rating from 179 reviews, reflecting consistent guest satisfaction. At £150 per night, you’re positioned just below the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60, yet your current occupancy for the next 90 days sits at 67.4% – still leaving 29 open nights and roughly £4,350 of untapped revenue. Bernadette, your host, is ready to make your stay seamless, even though she’s new to hosting. Whether you’re here for a romantic getaway, a family break, or a work‑cation, this canalside haven offers the space, comfort, and location to make your visit unforgettable.
top_amenity_gaps: Parking – no on‑site or nearby dedicated parking listed
Entertainment – lack of listed Wi‑Fi, TV streaming, or game options
Outdoor – beyond the balcony, no garden or patio space mentioned
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality shot of the balcony overlooking the canal as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the property’s unique location and biggest visual draw.
key_diagnosis: Occupancy: 29 open nights in the next 90 days equal ~£4,350 of potential revenue you’re missing – boost visibility and pricing to fill them.
Title: The current 42‑character title is generic; a more compelling, keyword‑rich title can improve search clicks and set your listing apart.
Amenities: No amenities are listed, leaving high‑value categories like parking, entertainment, and expanded outdoor space unaddressed, which competitors in the cohort highlight.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 29 open nights in the next 90 days, representing about £4,350 of potential revenue you could capture.
